text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
75 
FPL_PCT 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary's Household Income as a Percentage of the Federal Poverty Level 
DESCRIPTION: The beneficiary's or their household's income as a percentage of the federal poverty level (FPL). Used 
to assign the beneficiary to the eligibility group that covered their Medicaid or CHIP benefits. 
SHORT NAME: FPL_PCT 
LONG NAME: FPL_PCT 
TYPE: 
NUM
